heroText: Gamer, server admin, bot dev, and self-hosting chaos enjoyer. This is the hub for my public projects, tools, communities, and old pages I still want to keep around.
aboutText: Hey, I’m Sic4rioDragon. I build websites, Discord bots, game tools, server utilities, and smaller experiments for my own projects and communities.

stats.label: servers, backup tools, and map ideas

projects.title: Dead by Daylight Hub
projects.description: DBD pages, unlock tracking, personal rulebook, tools, and mini-game ideas around perks, killers, survivors, achievements, and farming resources.

projects.title: DBD Skillcheck Simulator
projects.description: A public skillcheck practice site with planned controller support, more perk-style skill checks, progress tracking, and a future/dev info tab.

projects.title: DayZ Guesser
projects.description: A GeoGuessr-style DayZ project, starting with Chernarus and local panorama/map experiments before party and account features later.

projects.title: Discord Bots
projects.description: Custom bots for moderation, media workflows, transcripts, server utilities, and community automation across different projects.

projects.title: Twitch Tab Manager
projects.description: Chrome extension work for opening followed Twitch channels, respecting tab limits, recovering managed tabs, and cleaning up offline/raid tabs.

projects.title: DBD Icon Pack Manager
projects.description: Desktop app idea for managing Dead by Daylight icon packs, comparing pack files, installing/reverting packs, and building mixed packs safely.

projects.title: OBS DBD Map Overlay
projects.description: OCR overlay experiments for detecting the current DBD map from loading screen or in-match text and showing it in OBS.

projects.title: DayZ Server / OmegaManager Tools
projects.description: Server admin notes, backup scripts, config cleanup, and restore documentation for DayZ servers and OmegaManager-style setups.

projects.title: Self-hosting / Mail Experiments
projects.description: Windows server, IIS, MailEnable/Roundcube experiments, domain mail setup, and notes for hosting services under my domains.

communities.label: Main TAW Discord
communities.description: The Art of Warfare main Discord.

archive.label: Old main page
archive.description: The previous main homepage version before the newer project-hub layout.
